div.h2: Accept Loop Under High Load: Draining Multiple Queued Connections

p.em: LT mode re-notifies across epoll_wait cycles; ET mode requires explicit drain — both benefit from looping to EAGAIN

p.strong: LT vs ET behaviour at the accept loop

tr.td: epoll fires ONCE per new-connection burst
ECONNABORTED (client RST before accept) → continue; never crash.
EMFILE/ENFILE → log warning, break; server survives.
